content.rendered:
The Trendz Beauty Academy

Meet the educator

Michellaine Tashina Helen Sleigh

Meet the educator at The Trendz Beauty Academy, a passionate and accomplished professional who brings both expertise and inspiration to the classroom. With a Bachelor’s Degree in Business Management and over 30 certifications in the beauty industry, she is a certified instructor with an impressive 6 years of teaching experience. As the owner and operator of The Trendz Beauty Salon for 6 successful years, she combines entrepreneurial leadership with hands-on knowledge. Her diverse background includes serving 2 years in the Canadian military, reflecting her discipline and resilience. Proudly Half Latina (Guatemalan) and Half Indigenous (Blackfoot), she celebrates her rich cultural heritage while empowering others through her work. At just 31 years old, she is also a devoted mother of two boys, embodying dedication, creativity, and inspiration in every aspect of her life.

Programs Offered at The Trendz Beauty Academy

Body Contouring Specialist
Permanent Makeup Specialist
Nail Specialist
Facial Specialist
Lash Extension Specialist
Teeth Specialist
Hair Removal Specialist
Training Options: Online, Blended, or 1:1 In-Person Training

About Us

The Trendz Beauty Salon

The Trendz Beauty Salon

Meet Michellaine the owner and face behind The Trendz Beauty Salon. Michellaine is a mother to two beautiful boys. Michellaine has her Bachelors Degree in Business Management and is certified in over 20 aesthetic services. Michellaine is currently studying to be a Lawyer. Michellaine also has a background in the Canadian Military. Michellaine is half Indigenous(Blackfoot) from Canada and half Latina from Guatemala. Michellaine speaks English, Spanish and some Blackfoot. Michellaine started The Trendz Beauty Salon to help women and men to look and feel their best. The Trendz Beauty Salon’s mission is to restore and empower the mind, body and spirit- through the unique services and staff. The Trendz Beauty Salon’s vision is to be the one-stop-shop that offers the latest trends in the beauty industry.

OUR MISSION

Our mission is to restore and empower the human mind, body, and spirit through our unique services and staff.

Trendz Beauty Salon!

Transform yourself at Trendz Beauty Salon

Welcome to Trendz Beauty Salon! If you’re looking for top-notch salon services in a comfortable and inviting atmosphere, you’ve come to the right place. Our team of skilled beauty professionals is committed to helping you look and feel your best. Whether you’re in need of a relaxing massage, a rejuvenating facial, or any other beauty treatment, we have the knowledge and expertise to deliver the results you desire. Plus, with our convenient location and flexible appointment scheduling, it’s easy to fit a visit to Trendz Beauty Salon into your busy schedule. So why wait? Book your appointment today and discover the trend-setting beauty services that have made us a favorite among our valued customers.
